title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
